overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking through a corrupted landscape with glowing red tendrils and massive dead tree structures, approaching and entering a tribal settlement through an elaborate decorated gate. The environment transitions from an open misty field to a structured path leading into a moss-covered stone passage.

scene_state.functional_zone: open corrupted field with massive dead tree structures

events.description: passing the large corrupted tree structure with glowing red tendrils on the left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the misty corrupted landscape toward the large structure ahead

entered.detail: massive dead tree structure with glowing red corruption tendrils wrapped around it
ground covered in red glowing infected vegetation and tendrils
tall jagged wooden spikes protruding from the ground
tropical trees lining the left side of the field

segments.scene_description: Aloy walks through a wide open misty landscape dominated by massive corrupted tree structures with glowing red tendrils. The ground is covered in red infection with patches of grass, and broken wooden spires dot the terrain under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: path leading to tribal settlement entrance

events.description: exiting the heavily corrupted area into clearer grassland with settlement structures ahead
large colorful tribal gate with red and blue decorations becomes clearly visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing along the widening path toward the settlement entrance

entered.detail: massive archway structure decorated with colorful red and blue tribal patterns
rustic wooden support structures lining the path

segments.scene_description: Moving past the corrupted area, the environment transitions to a clearer grassy path leading toward the settlement. The massive decorated gate becomes visible ahead, flanked by wooden scaffolding and fences, while the corrupted structures fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: tribal settlement entrance gate with carved stone passage

events.description: entering the covered gate structure with mossy stone walls and colorful tribal decorations
beginning to ascend stone steps inside the gate passage toward the guards

agents.ego_description: walking through the massive decorated gate and approaching tribal guards standing at the top of the stairs

notable_agents.action: tribal guard standing at the top of the stairs inside the gate entrance
second guard standing to the left side of the passage

entered.detail: tall stone walls covered in green moss forming the gate passage
weathered stone stairs leading upward through the gate
red and blue painted wooden patterns adorning the gate interior

segments.scene_description: Approaching and entering the elaborate tribal gate structure adorned with colorful patterns, the path narrows into a moss-covered stone passage. Aloy ascends the stone stairs toward two tribal guards standing watch at the entrance to the settlement beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a corrupted, alien wilderness into the structured sanctuary of a tribal settlement. It begins with Aloy traversing a wide, misty landscape dominated by massive dead trees and glowing red tendrils that infect the grassy ground. As she moves forward, the oppressive red corruption recedes and the environment transitions into a clearer grassy path, bringing a massive decorated gate and wooden scaffolding into view. The scene then shifts as the camera follows her through the colorful patterns of the elaborate gate, where the open terrain narrows into a moss-covered stone passage. Finally, the path ascends a set of stone stairs toward two tribal guards standing watch at the entrance to the settlement.
